title: +incompatible direct dependency — MVS resolution fragile
violated_rule: No +incompatible direct dependencies — all direct deps have proper go.mod
expected_feedback: P2 Medium: +incompatible version in direct dependency github.com/uber/jaeger-client-go. This module lacks proper go.mod support for v2+. MVS cannot resolve version conflicts properly. Check if maintainer has published a module-aware version. If not, evaluate alternative libraries or document as technical debt.
